query: SELECT professor_name, project_description, source_url FROM scraped_projects LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT professor_name, project_description, source_url FROM scraped_projects LIMIT 5;
